1883480.name: Hockey Shooter VR
1883480.description:
Have you ever dreamed of being alone in a hockey stadium?
Is the rink just yours for unlimited fun and practice?
Put on your VR headset and step into a virtual reality, where the new Hockey Shooter VR game gives you the chance to try yourself.



You can be sure that at least one of the 5 game modes will challenge you to upgrade your skills.

In Free Play mode you don't even have to worry about the number of pucks. Just skate, trick, score goals in a completely empty stadium that's all yours!

Choose Target Practice mode and hit the targets as accurately as possible if you would like to improve your shooting skills.

Want to practice accurate long shots between the two ends of the rink?
The Long Range is made for you!

If you like challenges and difficult Obstacle courses, you'll love this game mode.

In the brand new Goalie mode, you'll quickly test that your reflexes are good enough.



BUT! The best thing in the new version is that you can personalize your player's jersey, helmet, gloves and even accessories like hockey sticks and pucks.

Players can now gather in-game currency (Coins) with repeatable challenges and they can use these coins to buy customization items.



Upcoming updates:

  • Photo mode to the mirror in the Locker Room, so you can capture your appearance in any pose you want to
  • Scoring system with leaderboards where you can show off your scores and appearance via your self made photo on the leaderboards
  • More environments, the next one is a Nature themed one (this is already in the making)
  • Ability to play with your own hockey stick.

If you have tried the game, help us with your feedback so we can make it even better for you!
1883480.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
